data.content: Implementation review rejected again. The update API no longer passes identity flags, but newly written notes and handoff capsules still come back from Knots as username/agentname/model/version = unknown. /tmp/foolery-177c/src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts only repairs username via fallbackUsername; it does not rehydrate agent metadata from the active lease or lease-audit history, so the ReTakes metadata contract is still incomplete.
